proposed.title: Beyond Pressure
proposed.summary: Part of Bangkok Art Biennale (BAB2026), Beyond Pressure features works by artists from Myanmar, including Arahmaiani and Htein Lin.

proposed.title: Sustainability Focus
proposed.summary: Part of Bangkok Art Biennale (BAB2026), this focus section features works by artists reflecting on themes of sustainability, community, and emotional connections.

proposed.title: Nurture Gaia
proposed.summary: Part of Bangkok Art Biennale (BAB2026), Nurture Gaia features works by artists including Choi Jeong Hwa, Pokchat Worasab, Mutmee Pimdao Panichsamai, Zul Mahmod, Haritorn Akarapat, and Kanya Charoensupkul.
